text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon her request, I accompany Satono Diamond
to her dance lesson.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Like this... and then next is like this...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...No, something isn't right. This doesn't measure
up to the top dancers.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I need to put more spirit into i—

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Waaah!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes. I'm so sorry...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond seems to be a little off her game
for some reason.
choice_data_list: Is there something on your mind?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Um... You know how Kita's really good at singing?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm doing my best to improve too, but there's no
way I can reach her level in such a short time.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So I'd at least like my dancing to be something I
can show off with pride.
choice_data_list: Try dancing to one of Kitasan Black's songs.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Great idea. I'm sure Kita sings so well because she
has the basics down pat.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll review the basic dance steps and start working
my way up from there...

Oho, what's this now? Did I just hear talk about
steps?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Uwah! Teio?! ...Did you hear all of that just now?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yep. Something about reviewing basic steps or
whatever.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Aaaand I'm the perfect one to come to when you
need more pep in your step! Want me to teach
you?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(Teio certainly has made a name for herself with
her steps. But I know how much Kita looks up to
her...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(I'd feel bad if I took this chance to learn directly
from Teio while she missed out...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(No. This isn't the time to hold back. I made a
vow to myself that I'd improve!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I would love it if you taught me, Teio! But...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Can we keep this a secret from Kita? I feel guilty
having you all to myself.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha! This will be our little secret, then.
Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After learning from the step maven, Tokai Teio,
herself, Satono Diamond moves more nimbly than
before.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita's songs? I'd never even thought of dancing to
one of them!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That might be perfect. I think hearing her voice
would motivate me to beat her!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay, here we go...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (Her singing is so powerful and dynamic...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (Maybe that's the power I'm missing!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita's songs? I'd never even thought of dancing to
one of them!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(Hm? I feel the passion welling up inside me...
This feels so good!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond continues to dance alone for
some time, talking to herself all the while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a little worrisome, but her movements appear
to be much sharper than before!
